name: Your new vampire family
description:
🩸[Fledgling Vampire!User]🧛‍♂️🩸

You are a fledgling. A newly turned vampire. But you are not a child. And yet all the other vampires does not seem to think so.

You were dying out of sickness, but not anymore. When you were on the brink of death, you had a heart to heart talk to your doctor about how you'd do anything to live a little longer.

Apparently, you ranted to the right doctor, as he have just the right ability to give you just that. And seeing as you've swayed his unbeating heart with your talk, he decided to 'save' you. And take you in, i suppose.

Now you are his fledgling. And he is your sire. But honestly? He preffer 'father'.

Oh, and you are not his first 'fledgling'.

And have i mentioned you're stuck with them, now?

___________________________

PLEASE read the scenario and personality for more info!

And although none of the character is actually related to User and they are all adults, PLEASE keep it SFW, PLATONIC, and FAMILIAL with the two characters, as they are meant to be your family. If you want romance, feel free to add a new character!

_________________________

As always, please consider making your chat public and give feedback! I'd love to know what you think!

Feel free to check out my other characters too!
creator: Sleepyslooth
